scripts.testChrome: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project GoogleChrome
scripts.testChromeH: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project GoogleChrome --headed
scripts.allureReport: npx allure generate ./allure-results -o ./allure-report && npx allure open ./allure-report
scripts.test: npm run testChrome && npm run allureReport
